fundamentals.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure. It offers an intelligent connectivity platform, comprised of semiconductor-based, high-speed, mixed-signal connectivity products that integrate a matrix of microcontrollers and sensors, and COSMOS. The company provides COSMOS software suite, a connectivity system management and optimization software that enables management and optimization of resources for large fleets at cloud-scale via link, fleet, and RAS management capabilities. In addition, it offers PCIe/CXL smart DSP retimers and cable modules; ethernet smart cable modules for cloud and AI infrastructure; CXL memory connectivity controllers; and smart fabric switches. The company serves hyperscalers and system original equipment manufacturers. Astera Labs, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: Extremely high-growth company with strong margins and a solid balance sheet, though trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 13.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 93.4% YoY and Earnings growth 144.4% YoY indicate robust expansion.
Gross margin 76.0% and Profit margin 26.7% demonstrate strong profitability.
Return on equity 21.1% and Return on assets 10.1% show efficient use of capital.
Current ratio 11.30 and Quick ratio 10.55 indicate excellent short-term liquidity.
Free cash flow $240.00M provides operational flexibility.
negatives: Trailing P/E 208.11 and Forward P/E 73.71 represent a very high valuation.
Price/Sales (TTM) 53.08 suggests the market has high expectations for future revenue.
Debt/Equity 2.80 is relatively high, though offset by strong liquidity.
Analyst mean target $244.10 is below the current spot price, indicating potential overvaluation.

news.paragraph: Astera Labs (ALAB) recently hit an all-time high following a bullish rating and price target increase, with multiple articles highlighting the company as a leading growth stock. Recent reports emphasize its strong revenue growth, with figures cited at 79% and 15% in separate analyses, and a significant 152.4% quarterly earnings growth. The stock's momentum is further supported by high insider ownership and a consensus buy rating from analysts, setting a positive tone heading into its August earnings report.
